Module com.example.fasttype
Package com.example.fasttype.model

Class GameState

java.lang.Object
com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
All Implemented Interfaces:
LevelProgressable, Resettable, Validatable
public class GameState extends Object implements Resettable, Validatable, LevelProgressable
Represents the current state of a Fast Typing game session. Encapsulates level progression, scoring, timing, and word management. This class follows a pure Model pattern with no JavaFX dependencies.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Lesly Zapata

    Maximum level a player can reach (win condition).
    static final int
    MIN_TIME_SECONDS
    Minimum possible time limit per level, in seconds.
    static final int
    TIME_REDUCTION_AMOUNT
    Amount by which time is reduced every threshold, in seconds.

    Returns the remaining seconds in the current level.

    Returns whether the game is still active.

    Checks whether the player has won by reaching the maximum level.

    Resets the entire game back to its initial state (level 1, full time).

  • Constructor Details

    • GameState

      public GameState()
      Constructs a new GameState and starts the game from level 1.

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the entire game back to its initial state (level 1, full time).
      Specified by:
      reset in interface Resettable

    • resetGame

      public void resetGame()
      Convenience alias for reset().

    • submitAnswer

      public boolean submitAnswer(String playerAnswer)
      Validates the player's typed answer against the current word.
      Specified by:
      submitAnswer in interface Validatable
      Parameters:
      playerAnswer - the text entered by the player
      Returns:
      true if the answer was correct.

    • timeUp

      public boolean timeUp(String playerAnswer)
      Validates the player's answer when the timer expires.
      Specified by:
      timeUp in interface Validatable
      Parameters:
      playerAnswer - the text currently in the input field
      Returns:
      true if the answer was correct before time ran out

    • getCurrentLevel

      public int getCurrentLevel()
      Returns the current level number.
      Specified by:
      getCurrentLevel in interface LevelProgressable
      Returns:
      current level

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns the player's accumulated score.
      Specified by:
      getScore in interface LevelProgressable
      Returns:
      total score

    • isGameActive

      public boolean isGameActive()
      Returns whether the game is still active.
      Specified by:
      isGameActive in interface LevelProgressable
      Returns:
      true if the game has not ended

    • isWon

      public boolean isWon()
      Checks whether the player has won by reaching the maximum level.
      Specified by:
      isWon in interface LevelProgressable
      Returns:
      true if the current level exceeds the maximum

    • getRemainingTime

      public int getRemainingTime()
      Returns the remaining seconds in the current level.
      Returns:
      remaining time in seconds

    • getCurrentMaxTime

      public int getCurrentMaxTime()
      Returns the maximum time allowed for the current level.
      Returns:
      max time in seconds for this level

    • getCurrentWord

      public String getCurrentWord()
      Returns the word or phrase the player must type.
      Returns:
      current target word/phrase

    • tickTimer

      public void tickTimer()
      Decrements the remaining time by one second. Has no effect if the game is not active.

    • isTimeUp

      public boolean isTimeUp()
      Checks whether the timer has reached zero.
      Returns:
      true if remaining time is zero or less
